data.title: Denali Therapeutics Announces U.S. FDA Approval of AVLAYAH™ (tividenofusp alfa-eknm) for Treatment of Hunter Syndrome (MPS II)
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Denali Therapeutics Inc. disclosed that the U.S. FDA has granted accelerated approval for AVLAYAH™ (tividenofusp alfa-eknm), marking it as the inaugural FDA-approved biologic tailored to penetrate the blood-brain barrier to impact the entire body, including the brain. AVLAYAH is an enzyme replacement therapy designed for addressing neurologic symptoms of Hunter syndrome (mucopolysaccharidosis type II, or MPS II) in presymptomatic or symptomatic pediatric patients with a minimum weight of 5 kg before progressing to advanced neurologic decline. Sustained approval for this application might be subject to confirmation of clinical advantages in a subsequent trial.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Small Caps Lead Gains On Trump Peace Plan; These AI, Chip Plays Rally (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed an increase due to President Donald Trump's peace plan sent to Iran. On the other hand, oil prices experienced a significant decline. The day also saw small caps leading gains in the stock market. Additionally, certain AI and chip companies witnessed rallies. Overall, this news indicates positive movements in the stock market amidst geopolitical developments and fluctuations in oil prices.

data.title: CHIME UK Welcomes Introduction of Professional Standards for NHS Digital Health Workforce
data.description: In London on March 25, 2026, CHIME International, represented by its UK division, CHIME UK, expressed support for the introduction of new professional standards for NHS digital health workers. This development signifies a significant step towards enhancing the digital workforce within the healthcare sector.

data.title: Here's Why Bitcoin's 'Magic Day' Is Tax Day, April 15 And What Happens Next
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been range-bound since February, with questions arising about potential catalysts for a shift in the coming months. Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan and Head of Research Ryan Rasmussen suggested during a podcast that Bitcoin may continue trading sideways until mid-April. They outlined Bitcoin's near-term outlook in two phases, highlighting Apr. 15, U.S. Tax Day, as a potential inflection point that could drive the next move. This analysis points towards a period of anticipation leading up to Tax Day as a significant factor in Bitcoin's future trajectory.

data.title: Veryon Wins Two AI Awards for Advancing Aviation Maintenance and Reliability With Data Intelligence Platform
data.description: In San Francisco, Veryon has been awarded with two prestigious AI awards for its groundbreaking work in the aviation industry. These awards acknowledge the significant impact of Veryon's practical and data-driven innovations on aviation maintenance and reliability. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to advancing the industry.

data.title: Illinois Teacher Honored as 2026 Extraordinary Educator for Classroom Innovation
data.description: A Mount Prospect educator has been acknowledged by Curriculum Associates for their student-centered teaching approach and successful utilization of i-Ready® resources. The recipient, along with others, is set to engage in a yearlong nationwide professional development and leadership initiative. The recognition was announced on March 25, 2026, by Curriculum Associates.

data.title: ReFrame Analysis of IMDbPro Data Finds Rollback in Gender-Balanced Hiring on Both Sides of the Camera in the Top Films of 2025
data.description: Los Angeles-based ReFrame, a collaborative effort between Sundance Institute and WIF striving for gender equality in the screen sector, in partnership with IMDbPro, a key tool for entertainment professionals, disclosed that 26 out of the IMDbPro 100 most favored movies of 2025 will earn the ReFrame Stamp for promoting gender equality in production. The 2025 ReFrame Report, analyzing hiring patterns for significant positions in all 100 movies using IMDbPro information, is available for review.

data.title: Civix Achieves SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance for Go Elect and Go Grants, Expanding Security Transparency for Government Partners
data.description: Metairie, Louisiana - On March 25, 2026, Civix reported that its Go Elect and Go Grants platforms have obtained SOC 2 Type 2 compliance. After an external audit, these systems' operational and security controls were affirmed. This announcement signifies that the platforms meet industry standards and regulations to protect data. The compliance achievement demonstrates Civix's commitment to safeguarding information on their systems.
